name: linka
description: A local phone remote controller and temporary text/file transfer bridge for Windows.

scripts.build:native:mac: mkdir -p native/mac-input/bin && xcrun swiftc -O -framework ApplicationServices -framework AppKit native/mac-input/main.swift -o native/mac-input/bin/Linka.NativeInput
scripts.build:mac:app: npm run build:icon:mac && npm run build:native:mac && npm run build && electron-builder --mac dir
scripts.build:native:win: dotnet publish native/win-input/Linka.NativeInput.csproj -c Release -r win-x64 --self-contained true /p:PublishSingleFile=true
scripts.build:win:installer: npm run patch:electron-icon && npm run build:native:win && npm run build && electron-builder --win --dir && npm run apply:win-icon && set CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false && electron-builder --win nsis
scripts.build:win:unpacked: npm run patch:electron-icon && npm run build:native:win && npm run build && electron-builder --win --dir && npm run apply:win-icon
scripts.build:win:portable: npm run patch:electron-icon && npm run build:native:win && npm run build && electron-builder --win portable && npm run apply:win-icon
